remediation.summary: Reconciled dashboard latest-run data to May 19, switched visible agent version to v2, and added duplicate manual-run protection in source.
remediation.duplicate_run_finding: Schedule inspection found one active HubBot schedule. Multiple tasks were most likely caused by manual run triggers or reused v1 context, so the schedule was updated to run as a new task and the dashboard source was hardened against repeated run-now requests.
